TestCase z28Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: add 10 to elements at indices that are multiples of 5
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (i % 5 == 0) {
            follow_case.a[i] += 10;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
